Finding 1: verifyTrust requires PGP verification for x-bit execution — Proton headers alone are insufficient
Finding 2: after pgp.Verify, compare result.KeyID against contact.GPGKeyID — reject on mismatch
Finding 3: concurrency semaphore on worker goroutines — max 2 concurrent, configurable
Finding 4: system prompt includes adversarial-robustness instructions against prompt injection
Finding 5: escapeYAMLValue strips NUL bytes and caps subject length at 500 chars
Finding 6: mission ID validated against regex in Create before returning, not just at spawn time
Finding 7: worker HOME set to temp dir, PATH restricted to claude + ethos + beadle-email + git
Finding 8: TmpDir created with 0700 not 0750
Finding 9: covered by Finding 2 — key-to-sender binding
